// 001 — About
WHO
I AM

I'm a Senior 3D Artist & Technical Lead based in Barcelona with over 7 years of experience creating high-quality assets for mobile games, VR/AR applications, and educational platforms.

My work lives at the intersection of artistic vision and technical precision — specializing in stylized assets, Unity pipeline optimization, and mentoring art teams to push quality while hitting performance targets.

From shipping yearly titles in the Soccer Manager franchise to teaching the next generation of 3D artists at ENTI-UB, I bring both production experience and a deep understanding of real-time pipelines.

LocationBarcelona, Spain
SpecializationStylized 3D · Mobile · VR/AR
Primary EngineUnity (Expert)
LanguagesSpanish (Native) · English (B2)
EducationHigher Tech. 3D Animation · ENTI-UB
